memberdef.type: app.Services.CreateScope()) { var services=scope.ServiceProvider; try { var context=services.GetRequiredService< ApplicationDbContext >(); var logger=services.GetRequiredService< ILogger< Program > >(); if(useInMemory) { logger.LogInformation("Ensuring test database is created..."); await context.Database.EnsureCreatedAsync(); } else { logger.LogInformation("Applying database migrations..."); await context.Database.MigrateAsync(); } logger.LogInformation("Database ready."); var seeder=services.GetRequiredService< DbSeeder >(); await seeder.SeedAsync(); } catch(Exception ex) { var logger=services.GetRequiredService< ILogger< Program > >(); logger.LogError(ex, "An error occurred while migrating or seeding the database."); throw; } } if(!app.Environment.IsDevelopment()) { app.UseExceptionHandler("/Home/Error"); app.UseHsts();} app.UseSwagger()
memberdef.name: scope

memberdef.argsstring: ("/options", new[] { "OPTIONS" },(IEnumerable< EndpointDataSource > endpointSources)=> { var routes=endpointSources .SelectMany(es=> es.Endpoints) .OfType< RouteEndpoint >() .Select(e=> { var methods=e.Metadata.OfType< HttpMethodMetadata >().FirstOrDefault()?.HttpMethods ??[];var path="/"+(e.RoutePattern.RawText?.TrimStart('/') ?? "");return new { path, methods=methods.ToList() };}) .Where(r=> !string.IsNullOrEmpty(r.path)) .OrderBy(r=> r.path) .ToList();return Results.Json(new { routes });})
memberdef.name: MapMethods

param.type: { var routes=endpointSources .SelectMany(es=> es.Endpoints) .OfType< RouteEndpoint >() .Select(e=> { var methods=e.Metadata.OfType< HttpMethodMetadata >().FirstOrDefault()?.HttpMethods ??[];var path="/"+(e.RoutePattern.RawText?.TrimStart('/') ?? "");return new { path, methods=methods.ToList() };}) .Where(r=> !string.IsNullOrEmpty(r.path)) .OrderBy(r=> r.path) .ToList();return Results.Json(new { routes });}

briefdescription.para: Application startup and host configuration for PC Part Picker.

detaileddescription.para:
High-level responsibilities:
Configure services (DbContext, IPartService, CORS, Swagger)
Configure JSON serialization options for API controllers
Apply EF Core migrations and run <DbSeeder> at startup
Serve SPA ClientApp static files and provide API endpoints
This file is the entry point for the web application and is important to document so developers know where migrations, seeding, CORS and static file hosting are configured.
